title: vpi error: vpi_get_str(vpiFullName, 0) called with null vpiHandle.

features.name: dumpvars with generate loop accessing multi-dimensional array signal
features.description: Code should include a generate loop with nested for-loops using genvar variables, where an initial block inside calls $dumpvars on a multi-dimensional unpacked array signal accessed via hierarchical path with array indices
features.snippet:
genvar i, j, k;
generate
  for(i = 0; i < 4; i = i + 1) begin
    for(j = 0; j < 16; j = j + 1) begin
      for(k = 0; k < 32; k = k + 1) begin
        initial $dumpvars(0, top.mod.array[i][j][k]);
      end
    end
  end
endgenerate

features.name: dumpvars with zero delay and top-level module scope
features.description: Code should include $dumpvars called with delay 0 and top-level module scope to enable VCD dumping, which is typically used alongside generate-based dumpvars for selective signal dumping
